evidence_excerpt: I am writing in reference to your forthcoming proposal to the National Science Foundation, "Phenotypic Plasticity in Alpine Plant Communities under Shifting Snowpack Regimes."
rationale: Letterhead, date, salutation, named-proposal reference, and signature block match the letter-of-support form, but the body contains no concrete commitment of resources, collaboration, or effort, which lowers confidence.

secondary_candidates.rationale: The letter's substance — no resources offered, no collaborative role, no specific commitment — reads closer to general departmental correspondence than to a committal letter of support.
